title: Sidotheca trilobata
taxonomy: Sidotheca trilobata is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is native to Australia and is known to grow in a variety of environments. The exact classification of Sidotheca trilobata is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, order Oxalidales, family Elaeocarpaceae, genus Sidotheca, and species S. trilobata. Within the Elaeocarpaceae family, Sidotheca trilobata is one of the six accepted species. Sidotheca trilobata is closely related to other species in the Elaeocarpaceae family, which are primarily native to Australia and the Pacific Islands.
